question: If the dangerousness of a school is defined by the combined total of drug, alcohol, and bomb related incidents, identify the New York City schools ranked 5th to 10th in the school years of 2012-2013, 2013-2014, and 2014-2015. Among all schools in those three answers, how many are one of the original three specialized high schools in New York City? Return only the number in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3

source = 'datagov/2012-2013-vadir-incidents/files/rows.txt'
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3").get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), dtype=str, low_memory=False)

incident_cols = ["Drug Possession", "Alcohol Possession", "Bomb Threat"]
for col in incident_cols:
    df[col] = pd.to_numeric(df[col], errors="coerce").fillna(0)

df["School Name"] = df["School Name"].fillna("").str.strip()
df["BEDS Code"] = df["BEDS Code"].fillna("").str.strip()
df["Need/Resource Category"] = df["Need/Resource Category"].fillna("").str.strip()
filtered = df[
    df["Need/Resource Category"].eq("New York City")
    & df["School Name"].ne("")
].copy()
aggregated = filtered.groupby(["School Name", "BEDS Code"], as_index=False)[incident_cols].sum()
aggregated["dangerous_total"] = aggregated[incident_cols].sum(axis=1)
ranked = aggregated.sort_values(
    ["dangerous_total", "School Name", "BEDS Code"],
    ascending=[False, True, True],
    kind="mergesort"
).reset_index(drop=True)
answer = ", ".join(ranked.iloc[4:10]["School Name"].tolist())
1.subquestion: If the dangerousness of a school is defined by the combined total of drug, alcohol, and bomb related incidents, which New York City schools are the 5th to 10th most dangerous in New York in the school year of 2012-2013? Rank alphabetically if there is a tie and split with comma.
1.answer: Richmond Hill High School, Stuyvesant High School, High School Of Arts And Technology, Abraham Lincoln High School, Brooklyn Technical High School, Queens Metropolitan High School

3.subquestion: If the dangerousness of a school is defined by the combined total of drug, alcohol, and bomb related incidents, which New York City schools are the 5th to 10th most dangerous in New York in the school year of 2014-2015? Rank alphabetically if there is a tie and split with comma.
3.answer: Tottenville High School, Bronx High School Of Science, Fort Hamilton High School, High School For Health Professions & Human Services, Long Island City High School, Benjamin N Cardozo High School

4.fact: Brooklyn Technical High School, commonly called Brooklyn Tech and administratively designated High School 430, is a public specialized high school in New York City that specializes in science, technology, engineering, and mathematics. It is one of the three original specialized high schools operated by the New York City Department of Education, along with Stuyvesant High School and the Bronx High School of Science.
4.subquestion: How many schools from <hop 1 answer> are one of the original three specialized high schools in New York City?
